title: gymnosporia luteola
intro: Gymnosporia luteola, also known as the yellow coral tree, is a plant species that belongs to the Celastraceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions, including wounds and eczema. Gymnosporia luteola can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, as well as being used in topical creams and ointments for its medicinal and therapeutic applications.
